privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ExpenseTracker, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our application.
privacy.infoCollectDesc:
We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, and financial data you enter into the application such as transactions, budgets, savings goals, and investment records.

We also automatically collect certain technical information when you use our service, including your IP address, browser type, device information, and usage patterns.
privacy.howWeUseDesc:
We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, including processing your transactions, generating financial reports, and personalizing your experience.

We may also use your information to communicate with you about updates, security alerts, and support messages.
privacy.dataStorageDesc:
Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption (AES-256) both in transit and at rest. We use AWS infrastructure with regular security audits and penetration testing.

We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your data at any time through your account settings.
privacy.cookiesDesc:
We use essential cookies and local storage to maintain your session, remember your preferences (such as language and theme), and ensure the security of your account.

For more details, please see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc:
We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share anonymized, aggregated data for analytics purposes.

Our service may integrate with third-party authentication providers (e.g., for multi-factor authentication) which have their own privacy policies.
privacy.yourRightsDesc:
You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You may export your data in standard formats through the application.

You may also opt out of non-essential communications at any time through your account settings.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the support section in the application settings.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to ExpenseTracker. By accessing or using our application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before using our service.
terms.acceptanceDesc: By creating an account or using ExpenseTracker, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our service.
terms.accountsDesc:
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

You must provide accurate and complete information when creating your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.useOfServiceDesc:
You agree to use ExpenseTracker only for its intended purpose of personal financial management. You may not use the service to store or transmit malicious code, violate any applicable laws, or infringe on the rights of others.

You are solely responsible for the accuracy of the financial data you enter into the application.
terms.intellectualPropertyDesc:
ExpenseTracker and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by us and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

Your financial data remains your property. We do not claim ownership of the data you enter into the application.
terms.limitationDesc:
ExpenseTracker is provided as a financial tracking tool and does not constitute financial advice. We are not responsible for any financial decisions you make based on information displayed in the application.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.terminationDesc:
We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these terms, without prior notice. Upon termination, your right to use the service will immediately cease.

You may delete your account at any time through the application settings. Upon deletion, your data will be permanently removed in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will provide notice of significant changes through the application or via email. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.governingLawDesc: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws, without regard to conflict of law principles.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how ExpenseTracker uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our application. It explains what these technologies are, why we use them, and your rights to control our use of them.
cookies.whatAreCookiesDesc:
Cookies are small data files placed on your device when you visit a website or use an application. They are widely used to make services work more efficiently and to provide reporting information.

Cookies set by the service owner are called "first-party cookies." Cookies set by parties other than the service owner are called "third-party cookies."
cookies.howWeUseDesc:
We use cookies for the following purposes:

• Authentication: To keep you signed in and maintain your session securely.
• Preferences: To remember your settings such as language, theme, and currency preferences.
• Security: To support security features and detect malicious activity.
cookies.typesDesc:
Essential Cookies: Required for the application to function. These include session tokens and security cookies. These cannot be disabled.

Preference Cookies: Used to remember your settings (language, theme, currency). Stored in your browser's local storage.

We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
cookies.managingDesc:
You can control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies. However, disabling essential cookies may prevent you from using certain features of our application.

Your language and theme preferences are stored in local storage and can be changed at any time through the application settings.
cookies.thirdPartyDesc: We do not use third-party advertising or analytics cookies. Any third-party services we integrate with (such as authentication providers) may set their own cookies according to their own policies.
cookies.changesDesc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, regulation, or our business practices. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

header.title: Budget Planning
header.subtitle: Monitor monthly allocations, spot risk early, and keep {{month}} under control.

empty.title: No budget plan for {{month}} yet
empty.description: Create a monthly plan with a total budget and category allocations so this page can track spending against real limits from your backend snapshots.
empty.hint: Start with your essential categories first. You can keep the total budget tight, then adjust each category allocation as spending changes.

summary.title: Budget Summary
summary.description: Live overview for {{month}} using your API snapshot.
summary.dailyGuidanceWithLimit: This recommendation takes the lower value between the month pace and your profile daily limit, so the target stays realistic.
summary.dailyGuidanceWithoutLimit: Set a profile daily limit in settings if you want a stricter day-to-day spending target alongside this monthly plan.
summary.noTopSpending: No top spending categories yet for this month.
summary.paceHealthy: Your current pace looks healthy for this month.
summary.paceWarning: Spending pace is getting tight. Review large categories before month-end.
summary.paceOver: You are already beyond the planned monthly budget. Reallocate or reduce spending immediately.

categories.title: Category Allocations
categories.description: Adjust live category limits and alert thresholds without leaving the monthly budget screen.
categories.overBudgetHint: This category is already at risk. If you lower the allocation below current spending, it will stay over budget until you rebalance the month.
categories.exceedsBudgetMessage: This would make total allocated {{newTotal}}, exceeding your budget of {{totalBudget}} by {{excess}}. Reduce this allocation or increase the total budget first.
categories.lockedNoticeTitle: Some expense categories are not tracked this month
categories.lockedNoticeDescription: These categories exist but are not part of this month's budget. Use the Add Category section below to include them.
categories.noCategories: This budget exists, but there are no category allocations to manage yet.

dialog.createDescription: Set the total budget first, then decide which expense categories should be tracked for this month.
dialog.editDescription: Update the overall monthly budget. Category allocations are managed from the list below the summary.
dialog.leaveBlankHint: Edit mode allows updating the total budget amount only.
dialog.visualHint: Keep total allocated within the monthly total so the plan remains realistic.
dialog.allocationOver: Allocated category amounts cannot be greater than the total monthly budget.
dialog.selectCategories: Select expense categories to include in this month and give each one its own allocation and alert threshold. Drag selected categories to reorder them.
dialog.noExpenseCategories: No expense categories are available yet. Create expense categories first, then come back to build this budget.
dialog.categoryThresholdHint: 80 means the warning should start when the category has used 80% of its budget.

feedback.confirmResetText: All snapshot spending values for this month will be reset to zero. Use this only when you intentionally want a fresh start.
feedback.confirmDeleteText: This removes the monthly budget and its category allocations. The operation cannot be undone from the UI.
feedback.confirmRemoveCategoryText: This will remove the category allocation from this monthly budget. You can add it again later.

budgetPulse.title: Budget Pulse ({{month}})
budgetPulse.subtitle: Live budget context while reviewing transactions.
budgetPulse.nobudget: No monthly budget found for this period.
